mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_global_search_index ( entity_type, entity_id, title, subtitle, summary, search_text, customer_id, customer_name, owner_user_id, customer_owner_id, assigned_user_id, upload_user_id, create_user_id, participant_user_ids, route_path, sort_time ) VALUES ( #{index.entityType}, #{index.entityId}, #{index.title}, #{index.subtitle}, #{index.summary}, #{index.searchText}, #{index.customerId}, #{index.customerName}, #{index.ownerUserId}, #{index.customerOwnerId}, #{index.assignedUserId}, #{index.uploadUserId}, #{index.createUserId}, #{index.participantUserIds}, #{index.routePath}, #{index.sortTime} ) ON CONFLICT (entity_type, entity_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, subtitle = EXCLUDED.subtitle, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, search_text = EXCLUDED.search_text, customer_id = EXCLUDED.customer_id, customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name, owner_user_id = EXCLUDED.owner_user_id, customer_owner_id = EXCLUDED.customer_owner_id, assigned_user_id = EXCLUDED.assigned_user_id, upload_user_id = EXCLUDED.upload_user_id, create_user_id = EXCLUDED.create_user_id, participant_user_ids = EXCLUDED.participant_user_ids, route_path = EXCLUDED.route_path, sort_time = EXCLUDED.sort_time, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT g.entity_type, g.entity_id, g.title, g.subtitle, g.summary, g.customer_id, g.customer_name, g.route_path, g.sort_time, NULL AS score FROM crm_global_search_index g
ORDER BY g.sort_time DESC NULLS LAST, g.update_time DESC
